# defectdojo_dojo_group (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Dojo Group. You can specify either the `id` or the `name` to look up the Dojo Group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by name
data "defectdojo_dojo_group" "example" {
  name = "My Group"
}

# Or lookup by ID
# data "defectdojo_dojo_group" "by_id" {
#   id = "1"
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier
- `name` (String) The name of the Dojo Group. Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the Dojo Group
